today.title: GDC Weekly Sync
today.synopsis: Weekly cross-functional sync chaired by Colin Brannigan. Strong sprint story to lead with — 8 tickets completed in the last 48h including the HIGH-priority Page Bloat SEO task. Two blockers (GDCU-8810 and GDCU-8907) remain unresolved at Day 6, and Vic Dadson's ~21-day absence needs to be raised.
discussion_topics: Sprint velocity: 8 tickets completed in 48h — GDCU-8874 (Page Bloat SEO/HIGH), GDCU-8806 (Age Gate), GDCU-8936 (Ace Navigation), GDCU-8955 (Cool Tones Phase 2), GDCU-8948 (Prize Boxes 5th), GDCU-8959 (Duplicate Payment Methods), GDCU-8899 (VPN Research), GDCU-8894 (Vue Scoped Styles)
GDCU-8810 Developer Accounts — Day 6 blocked (Harden), RotoWire contact not yet confirmed
GDCU-8907 Betting Tips Hub — Day 6 blocked in QA (Sanja), fix reported done 07/05 but ticket never updated
World Cup 11 June hard deadline — GDCU-8935 (WC Predictor, Miguel), GDCU-8904 (Group Bets Widget, Miguel), GDCU-8392 (Cosmo Spins Reskin, Ciara) all In Progress
Vic Dadson — ~21 days without Slack activity, expected return was ~05/05; cover plan needed if still absent
today.prep_notes: Lead with the 8-ticket sprint completion — strong team performance. Have GDCU-8810 blocker timeline context ready (RotoWire route could cut 6–8 weeks to 1–2 weeks). Confirm Sanja has unblocked GDCU-8907 before this call so you have a live status. Raise Vic's absence directly with Colin if she has not made contact this morning. Zoom: https://gdcgroup.zoom.us/my/colinbrannigan

today.title: UX Catchup

discussion_topics: GDCU-8935 World Cup Predictor Game (Miguel) — design progress vs 11 June deadline
GDCU-8904 Group Bets Widget (Miguel) — design completion status; if done, schedule KO call with Chloe and dev team today
GDCU-8392 WC Cosmo Spins Reskin (Ciara) — sequencing with GDCU-8619, timeline vs 11 June
GDCU-8906 NL Claude Generated Tables (Jessica) — In Progress, agree delivery target
GDCU-8847 VIP Operator List (Nebojsa) — Mike to confirm review timeline for Nebojsa
today.prep_notes: Ask Miguel directly: (1) WC Predictor — how many of the 48 group-stage match designs are done? (2) Group Bets — is design signed off? If yes, Chloe needs the KO call scheduled today. Check with Ciara: when does she expect GDCU-8619 (Operator List Redesign) to wrap so she can start the Cosmo Spins WC reskin? GDCU-8847 is the only In Product ticket — review it before this call if possible. Zoom: https://gdcgroup.zoom.us/j/4789482034

today.prep_notes: Note: overlaps with UX Catchup (11:30–12:00). Use the 12:00–13:00 window for GDCU-8847 product review so Nebojsa has feedback before the 14:30 standup.

today.title: GDCU Assemble Standup
today.synopsis: Full team daily standup. Strong story with 8 completions to acknowledge. Only one ticket in Product review (GDCU-8847). Two tickets remain on Blocked priority (GDCU-8810, GDCU-8907). Vic Dadson is on the invite — note whether she joins.
discussion_topics: GDCU-8847 VIP Operator List (Nebojsa) — sole In Product ticket, Mike to provide review outcome
GDCU-8907 Betting Tips Hub (Sanja) — Blocked priority in QA, confirm fix is live and unblock
GDCU-8810 Developer Accounts (Harden) — Blocked priority Day 6, RotoWire contact status
GDCU-8957 Local Nav on News Articles (Carlos) — newly in QA, flag if QA finds blockers
WC deliverables check-in: GDCU-8935, GDCU-8904, GDCU-8392
Acknowledge 8 completions over last 48h — strong sprint performance
today.prep_notes: Have GDCU-8847 review feedback ready before standup. Check if Vic joins — this will determine whether to escalate her absence. Ask Sanja publicly to confirm GDCU-8907 fix status so QA can resume. Zoom: https://gdcgroup.zoom.us/j/4789482034

action_items.action: REVIEW GDCU-8847 VIP Operator List (Nebojsa Stanic, In Product, Medium) — the sole remaining In Product ticket after 8 completions yesterday. UK feature: VIP users (ktag level ≥2) see a custom revenue-share operator list via the AdTech personalisation API or D1 database. Acceptance criteria: VIP see new list, non-VIP see regular list, filters and show-more work. Target: review and approve or provide feedback before today's 14:30 standup.

GDC WEEKLY SYNC PREP — 10:00 BST with Colin Brannigan. Lead with: (1) 8 tickets completed in 48h — strongest sprint completion recently; (2) GDCU-8810 Developer Accounts Day 6 blocked — RotoWire route; (3) GDCU-8907 Betting Tips Hub Day 6 blocked in QA; (4) WC 11 June deadline check — Group Bets, WC Predictor, Cosmo Spins all In Progress; (5) Vic Dadson ~21 days no Slack activity — raise cover plan.

VIC DADSON — Day ~21 without Slack activity (last seen 21/04). Expected back ~05/05. No contact yet today. Check before the 10:00 GDC Weekly Sync: has she reached out? If not, raise with Colin Brannigan in the sync and agree an escalation/cover plan. If she does make contact, arrange a 1-1 to re-onboard and reassign any blocked data work.

GDCU-8810 DEVELOPER ACCOUNTS — Day 6 blocked (Harden Thomas Wallace, In Progress, Blocked priority, last updated 06/05). Critical first step still outstanding: contact the RotoWire team to determine if GDC Group org accounts already exist on Apple App Store and Google Play — this could cut 6–8 weeks to 1–2 weeks. Raise progress in GDC Weekly Sync with Colin and Gabriel today.

GDCU-8907 BETTING TIPS HUB — Day 6 blocked (Sanja Budic, In QA, Blocked priority, last updated 06/05). Sanja stated fix was done on 07/05 (European leagues returning) but ticket has not been updated. Confirm with Sanja directly: is the fix deployed and can QA resume? If yes, update priority from Blocked to normal and progress ticket. High-visibility ticket: Gabriel, Mike, Miguel, Michael Butlin, Diarmuid, Eoin, Joshua, Ciara, Dan all stakeholders.

WORLD CUP PREDICTOR GAME (GDCU-8935, Miguel Migneco, In Progress) — 11 June hard deadline. Get concrete design progress update from Miguel in today's 11:30 UX Catchup. Full scope: entry flow, group stage predictions (48 matches), knockout bracket, outrights, leaderboard, mobile-first at 3 breakpoints, £10k prize pool. If design not on track, assess impact on dev handoff immediately.

GROUP BETS WIDGET (GDCU-8904, Miguel Migneco, In Progress) — check in UX Catchup today whether design is complete. If yes → schedule KO call with Chloe Christie and dev team immediately (11 June hard deadline). Group Bets is one of the key WC features and any design delay directly compresses dev time.

WC COSMO SPINS RESKIN (GDCU-8392, Ciara Carroll, In Progress, 🔥) — check in UX Catchup today: when does Ciara expect to deliver GDCU-8619 (Operator List Redesign) so she can start the WC reskin? Full scope: WC-themed symbols, animations, 3 audio tracks, background, frames, countdown clock, menu animation, banners. Hard deadline 11 June.

ACKNOWLEDGE SPRINT COMPLETIONS — 8 tickets went Done in last 48h (Monday): GDCU-8874 (Page Bloat SEO/HIGH), GDCU-8806 (Age Gate), GDCU-8936 (Ace Navigation), GDCU-8955 (Cool Tones P2), GDCU-8948 (Prize Boxes 5th), GDCU-8959 (Duplicate Payment Methods), GDCU-8899 (VPN Research), GDCU-8894 (Vue Scoped Styles). Celebrate team performance in standup and/or a Slack message to #gdc-pod.

JESSICA DORDEVIC — Two active items: (1) GDCU-8928 IUJ Banners (In Progress, updated 11/05 12:18) — check status today; (2) GDCU-8906 NL Claude Generated Tables (In Progress, updated 11/05 11:59) — agree delivery timeline in UX Catchup. Both tickets are In Progress after her return from leave.

LIAM CAFFREY INTERVIEW — Confirm Wed 14/05 12–3pm interview slot with Liam and Gabriel. Liam flagged Mike's calendar looks full in that window. Check calendar and reply to Liam's DM to confirm the slot. Prepare brief interview context and questions.

completed_48h.summary: [GDC][Dev][SEO] Page Bloat: Reduce HTML payload size across all markets — CookieYes, SSR operator list, VWO, inline scripts
completed_48h.note: HIGH priority SEO ticket completed. Was awaiting Mike's approval for 4+ days. Four-fix approach: CookieYes lazy render (−432 KB), SSR operator list (−400–1,212 KB), VWO async, inline scripts cleanup.
App Store compliance gate completed. Apple Guideline 5.3 and Google Play requirement. 18+ age confirmation on first launch.

completed_48h.summary: [GDC][DEV] Refactor scoped styles on Vue components
completed_48h.note: CWV improvement — scoped Vue styles migrated to regular CSS.

completed_48h.summary: [GDC][DEV][RESEARCH] - How to Block Restricted Users Using VPN from Playing FTP Games
completed_48h.note: Research complete on VPN blocking for free-to-play games (restricted countries: India, Indonesia, Chile, etc.). Solution to be reviewed before implementation.
